---
title: "Import Data"
author: "Jean de Dieu"
date: "2026-05-05"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

install.packages("haven")
library(haven)

# Create a sample dataset
datasample <- data.frame(
  ID = 1:10,
  Name = c("Jean", "Alice", "Bob", "David", "Emma", "Frank", "Grace", "Helen", "Ian", "Jane"),
  Age = c(25, 30, 28, 35, 22, 40, 27, 33, 29, 31),
  Salary = c(500, 600, 550, 700, 450, 800, 520, 680, 590, 610)
)

# View data
print(datasample)

write_sav(datasample, "datasample.sav")
list.files()
"datasample.sav"
data_loaded <- read_sav("datasample.sav")

head(data_loaded)
write_sav(datasample, "C:/Users/jeandedieu.rwabukang/Documents/R Assignment for Import/datasample.sav")


spss_data <- read_sav("C:/Users/jeandedieu.rwabukang/Documents/R Assignment for Import/datasample.sav")
head(spss_data)


# Create .dta file
set.seed(123)
n <- 100
loan_data <- data.frame(
  LoanID = 1001:(1000 + n),
  ClientID = sample(2001:3000, n),
  ClientName = paste("Client", 1:n),
  Gender = sample(c("Male", "Female"), n, replace = TRUE),
  Age = sample(21:65, n, replace = TRUE),
  LoanAmount = round(runif(n, 500000, 20000000), 0),
  InterestRate = round(runif(n, 10, 20), 2),
  LoanTermMonths = sample(c(12, 24, 36, 48, 60), n, replace = TRUE),
  LoanType = sample(c("Personal", "Mortgage", "Business", "Agriculture"), n, replace = TRUE),
  DisbursementDate = sample(seq(as.Date("2023-01-01"), as.Date("2025-01-01"), by="day"), n, replace = TRUE),
  Status = sample(c("Active", "Closed", "Defaulted", "Pending"), n, replace = TRUE),
  CollateralValue = round(runif(n, 0, 30000000), 0)
)
loan_data$MonthlyInstallment <- round(
  (loan_data$LoanAmount * (1 + loan_data$InterestRate/100)) / loan_data$LoanTermMonths,
  0
)
head(loan_data)
write_dta(loan_data, "loan_datasample.dta")
list.files()
stata_data <- read_dta("loan_datasample.dta")
head(stata_data)
write_dta(loan_data, "C:/Users/jeandedieu.rwabukang/Documents/R Assignment for Import/loan_datasample.dta")


install.packages("DBI")
install.packages("odbc")
install.packages("RMySQL")
install.packages("RPostgres")

# Connect to Postgresql
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)
con_pg <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  dbname = "employees",
  host = "localhost",
  user = "postgres",
  password = "jado",
  port = 5432
)
Credit_Data <- dbGetQuery(con_pg, "SELECT * FROM credit")
head(Credit_Data)
dbDisconnect(con_pg)
```
